main.name: Bruno Rocha
main.description: Full Stack developer with experience building scalable web applications using modern frameworks and libraries. I am proficient in JavaScript and TypeScript across the stack, including React.js, Next.js, Node.js, and Nest.js, with solid expertise in RESTful APIs, clean architecture (DDD/TDD), and SQL and NoSQL databases. I have experience working in remote, distributed, and agile environments, collaborating with multidisciplinary teams and communicating technical concepts effectively to both technical and non-technical stakeholders. I am expanding my knowledge of AWS (Lambda, Amplify, EKS) to build scalable cloud solutions.
